name: Morning Stretch
description: Light stretching and mobility work to wake up the body and loosen stiff muscles.

name: Morning Cardio Walk
description: 30-40 minutes of brisk walking or light cardio to support lipid balance.

name: Take Omega-3 fatty acids
description: Omega-3 fatty acids: To help maintain healthy triglyceride levels and support cardiovascular health.

name: Take Niacin (Vitamin B3)
description: Niacin (Vitamin B3): May help increase HDL cholesterol levels.

name: Take Fiber supplements (e.g., psyllium husk)
description: Fiber supplements (e.g., psyllium husk): To support cholesterol management by reducing LDL cholesterol.

name: Evening Stretch
description: Gentle stretching or breathing work to wind down before sleep.

name: Sleep
description: Aim for a consistent sleep window to support recovery, hormone balance, and energy.
